programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Myself in the Future. Tish and her friends have been set homework to paint themselves in the future. All of Tish's friends seem certain on their future jobs, but Tish is not sure at all.
Dizzy. Children's animation. When Bing wants to get dizzy on the roundabout, Pando pushes him. Bing quickly learns that a little dizzy is fun but too much dizzy is no fun at all.
Sliding Down. Preschool series. The Tubby Car takes the Teletubbies to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Slidey and have great fun sliding down again and again.
Tee's Shop. With a little help from Mo, Tee decides to set up his own shop and sell his old and broken toys.
The Good, the Bad and the Prickly. Prickly Pear arrives in the supermarket and wants Evil Pea's freezer for his new home.
PJ Party. Bing is sleeping at Sula's house but has forgotten Hoppity!
The Sticky Sauce Situation. Fabio's yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojo's bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to 'unsticky' that sauce!
Song of Peace. The Squirrels hear the gerbils' peace song and push some buttons with Betty.
The History Badge. The Squirrels get a special history lesson from Duggee and some faces from the past.
Whale Watching. The kids want Mum and Dad to play whale watching, but they are tired after a late night.
Mr Monkeyjocks. Bluey and Bingo must prove Mr Monkeyjocks is special to save him from being chucked out.
Cheddar Gorge, England. Glitch turns Cheddar Gorge into a giant cheese fondue.
The Tale of the Treehouse Rescue. Animated series. Peter is forced to reveal the location of the secret treehouse to Flopsy and Mopsy, so the girls decide to hang out in Peter's den.
Boiling River. While in search of a boiling river, Kwazii and Paani meet some tamarin monkeys.
One's Fix-It Shop. One uses her brand new workbench and special goggles to help her friends put their broken toys back together again. Can she help them all?
Surprise. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. P, A, R and Y plan a surprise for T - but first they must get out of a trap!
Perfect Pineapple Party Day. Love Monster's pineapple costume makes it hard for him to take part in any party events.
Star. Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?
Banana. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Banana revealing yet another astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Eggy Head. Children's animation. At Amma's creche the children make eggy heads with egg shells and cress seeds. Bing knows his Eggy needs time to grow 'hair' but waiting is hard.
Shorts. Dee encourages a friend to say 'shorts', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see swimming shorts, grey shorts and even a pair of dancing shorts!
Fruit Caboose. Lu's upset when Declan takes a bite of her pear.
Bunny Wheel. The Piggies rebuild a big wheel, but the instructions are missing. While Cesar searches, Charlie and Cornelia start building anyway. What could go wrong?
More About Next To. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch a waiter set a table with plates and cutlery, then decide to help out by adding more items to the table.
Theme Park Adventure. Justin and his friends ride a rollercoaster, and Mr Tumble sings the Tumble Toys to sleep.
Waving. Preschool series. After a fun waving game with the Tiddlytubbies, the Teletubbies enjoy watching children waving as they set off on a short boat trip.
Park. Nigel and Baby Bear invite grown-ups and their babies to explore park-themed toys and objects through discovery, play, song and story time. Everyone at home can join in too!
Cafe. Elsee joins her friend Fiadh at a local café for a game of I-spy.
Colours. Isla and Abbie join Aaron to discover all the amazing spring colours bursting out around the city garden - but what will they find?
Gardener. Dylan the gardener wants to make something grow! But growing takes time, so he and his pals need to get creative...
Art. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. In this blues song, the Potatoes enter famous paintings and sculptures, celebrating different ways art is created.
I Spy. During a game of I-spy, Ginger spots something that none of the Peas can see.
Teasing. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. Dad argues that he was only playing as they recall all the times when he's been a big teaser.
The Crazy Golf Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels practise their golf in pursuit of a round of milkshakes.
Where Is My Home? The Game Catchers arrive on the Underwater Planet and play follow the clue. They are interrupted by a lost turtle, who can't seem to find her way home.
Baby Time Timmy. Timmy has fun playing mummies with Mittens but soon discovers that being a baby has its downsides.
Iona and Elba's Mission to Mars. Iona and Elba pretend to be astronauts and blast off into space! They land on Mars and discover aliens who look a lot like Mum and Dad.
Zahra-Rose's Somalian Nafaqo. Zahra-Rose's dish is Somalian nafaqo, made using mashed potato stuffed with boiled egg.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Mice. Chantelle helps release harvest mice. Rory and Sandy build a tennis ball mouse house.
Mission: Messy Rug. When guide dog Kika has a waggy tail-related accident with a purple smoothie, she and her owner Dr Amit visit the Woofton Library of Things to borrow a carpet cleaner.
Python and Pelican. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the reticulated python and the pelican.
Sponsored Waffle. Waffle, Simon, Doug, Evie and Ruby do a sponsored silence to raise money for the school.
Bird Detective. Oona turns bird detective and learns all about seagull behaviour.
A Day in the Life. Yukee's garden friends help turn her 'a day in my life' homework assignment into an exciting, musical sound adventure.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Traffic Badge. Animated preschool series. Duggee is taking the Squirrels to the lake, but lots of people have had the same idea and there's a traffic jam.
Peas. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'peas', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, having lots of fun with peas.
The Rolling Sixes. Join the Six Times Table in a game show to work out who the Rolling Sixes are. The start and end are easy, but can she figure out the friends in the middle?
Hey! Educational fun. It's pandemonium at the Alphablocks' animal singsong. S has a special surprise in store.
Superheroes. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Justin and his friend pretend to be superheroes. Super Tumble rescues Shopkeeper Tumble, Baker Tumble and Aunt Polly.
Taking a Ride. Preschool series. The Teletubbies ride the Dup Dup and the Tubby Custard Machine. In Tummy Tales, a boy takes a ride on a cable car.
Patchwork Flamingo. Patchwork Flamingo has a problem: he's all twisted! Can the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?
Raa Raa and the Ladybird Den. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Crocky doesn't know where his collection of sticks has gone until Pia realises Raa Raa took them by mistake.
Chug Patrol, Out of Control. Wilson struggles at being a good chief when he puts together his own Junior Chug Patrol Crew with Zephie, Piper and Hoot & Toot.
Episode 8. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. The Berrito Brothers test their strength and Keith Fitt demonstrates swimming strokes in the studio.
Dock Machines. Grace shows off three amazing machines that work in docks!
Where Is My Nose? The Game Catchers land on the Plasticine Planet to play crab race.
Humpback Whales. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. When a sardine swallows an important key, a humpback whale helps Kwazii track it down.
The Tale of the Downhill Escape. Animated series. Peter takes Benjamin and Lily on a wild ride down a steep slope. When Benjamin gets injured, Peter has to navigate them to safety.
The Dressing Up Badge. Animated preschool series. It's Enid's birthday. She doesn't like surprises or cakes, so the Squirrels will throw her a dressing up party. But how?
The Sweetwood Explorer's Helping Day. Grandpa Beaver has a leak in his dam, and it's up to the Sweetwood Explorers to help him!
To Catch a Button. Supertato promises Raisin that he will keep her most precious button, Princess Bella Bob, safe. But Evil Pea plans to take it to ruin Supertato's reputation.
Mission Basketball. Weasy teams up with the cheating Chipmunk to win a game of basketball.
Swoppiton Speed Scramble. How can Mojo and Bo win the big race when they have to keep stopping and swopping?
Whale Watching. The kids want Mum and Dad to play whale watching, but they are tired after a late night.
Octopus. Chloe tries to teach her dad a game she learnt at Bluey's house.
The Slide. Nugget agrees to take on a scary new ice slide but loses her nerve, so Pancake comes up with a face-saving plan. But when disaster strikes, they decide to come clean.
Andy and the Snow Leopard. Andy heads to the Himalayas in his safari-mobile in search of the elusive snow leopard. Along the way, he shrinks down and goes flying with a golden eagle.
Waffle's School Walkies. Waffle walks Evie to school on her first day and gets into trouble with the headteacher.
The Freeze Wish. Rafi freezes the café to read with Finn, but mischief follows. She decides a quiet bedroom corner is the perfect place to read books.
It's Time to Go to the Airport. JoJo, Gran Gran, Mummy and Daddy are at the airport waiting to take a flight to see a special someone - Great-Gran Gran.
Magic Panic. Umbrella needs Sarah and Duck's help after he promises to put on a magic show.
The Box. Stop-motion animation. Small finds some 'space treasure' but doesn't know what it is for. Then Tiny too finds her own space treasure - a strange box.
Squish Up. MeMo and BaBa need to find the right home for the squishy ball they've been playing with.
Too Loud Tombliboos! Nice and Quiet. Series for young children. The Tombliboos practise music so loudly it can be heard across the garden. The Pontipine children know how to stop it.
Blue Peter Presenters - The Very Hungry Caterpillar. Blue Peter presenters Abby, Shini, Joel and Hacker read the classic story of one caterpillar with a huge appetite.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Tish the Great. Tish is given a magic set by her dad. He challenges her to learn at least one trick by the end of the day.
House. Children's animation. Bing builds a house out of the sofa cushions, and Coco decides it's the perfect starting point for a game of big bad wolf with Sula and Charlie.
Backwards Forwards. Preschool series. The Teletubbies have fun moving backwards and forwards. The Tubby Custard Ride goes forwards, then backwards, then forwards again.
Splash. Tee enjoys his time in the paddling pool and doesn't want to get out. Can Mo lure him out of it with the promise of a warm bath?
The Great Book Rescue. Evil Pea takes all the books in the supermarket to build a huge tower.
Hose Pipe. Bing turns the garden hose on too fast, turning it into a big snake!
Supersecret Swoptops. It's secret agent time when Mojo and Bo think Didi the tractor is up to something fishy. But can the two supersecret spies follow her without being spotted?
Squirrel Babies. Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with, Hennie bounces around in new dance shoes, and Happy loves water as much as Roly loves potatoes!
The Art Badge. The Squirrels learn about different types of art and what inspires them while preparing their own pieces for Tino the Artistic Mouse's Woodland Biennale.
Family Meeting. When Dad's accused of 'fluffing' in Bluey's face, Mum calls a meeting to settle the matter.
Double Babysitter. Both Uncle Rad and Frisky accidently turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo.
Mountain Gorillas, The Democratic Republic of the Congo. The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters.
The Tale of the Bird Trap. Animated series. Mr Tod's efforts to creep up on the rabbits are thwarted by a noisy song thrush, so he cages the bird.
Kalahari Copycat. When a fire threatens a meerkat burrow, the Octonauts must put it out.
Happy Campers. One and Two are off on a camping trip, and together they have fun sharing things equally between them. Can they carry on sharing things fairly when Three and Four join them?
Bus. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. S, T, O and P get caught on a runaway bus: what can they do?
Hot, Hot, Hot Day. Book Cub leaves Love Monster in charge of her fro-yo van while she gets more cups, but he causes a mess when he accidentally breaks the fro-yo machine.
Cup. Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?
Avocado. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fabulous Avocados singing an operatic piece in their three unique voices!
Toy Party. Children's animation. Bing gets jealous when Sula pays more attention to Pando on a playdate. As he feels more and more left out, Bing tries to get Sula's attention.
Zebra. Dee encourages a friend to say 'zebra', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of zebras - a spiky hair zebra, a zooming zebra, a baby zebra and a rainbow zebra!
Bin Bug. Lu upsets the other bugs when she refuses to share the most fun role in a game.
Bunny Babysitting. Fiona has to babysit the Bunnies, but they're bouncing off the walls! She calls the Piggies for help, but even they find this task impossible.
More About Open and Close. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos see an artist drawing a dog and decide to open and close the door to let the dog in and out of the room.
Dragon School. Justin visits a friend's school to make a recycled dragon and to take part in a dragon parade. Meanwhile, it's school photo day with Teacher Tumble - say cheese!
Catch the Ball. Preschool series. The Teletubbies play with a bubble, and then Po and Laa-Laa play catch with a ball. In Tummy Tales, two brothers learn to catch a ball.
Hat. Giovanna and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore hats through discovery, play, song and story.
Rugby. Elsee joins her friend Karlaine to watch a rugby match and play a game of I-spy.
Sounds of the Garden. Novah, Nelly and Aaron enjoy the amazing sounds of the city garden.
Deep-Sea Diver. Dylan the diver wants to take a picture of the deepest, darkest bottom of the sea. When he discovers it is too dark for his camera, he turns to a new friend for some help.
Feelings. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes sing a guitar-driven rock 'n' roll anthem celebrating their feelings.
Baby Banana. Ginger and the Peas look after a baby Bananaraptor, who proves to be more than a handful.
Asparagus. Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.
The Mystery Badge. The Squirrels go to a fancy party at King Tiger's house and become embroiled in a mystery when the prized ruby centrepiece disappears from his party crown.
The Musical Cow. The Game Catchers land on a cartoon-like planet to play hit the can.
Timmy Finds Aliens. Timmy and his friends make a collage of the moon, complete with green aliens.
Amanapreet's Pakora Feast. Amanpreet and Mum make delicious pakora together for a special family meal to celebrate Vaisakhi. What will everyone think of Amanpreet's fabulous feast?
Emilio's Cypriot Pitta Bread with Halloumi. Emilio is making Cypriot pitta bread with a side of halloumi and red pepper skewers.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Millipedes. Chantelle meets a red-legged millipede. Rory, Sandy and Zoe recycle like millipedes.
Mission: Open Day. When Dan's favourite toy goes missing at the Search and Rescue Centre Open Day, Dan needs his super nose to race to the rescue of Squiddy!
Coquerel's Sifaka and Vampire Crab. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's sifakas and vampire crabs.
School Dog Waffle. The Brooklyn-Bells take Waffle to school to ask the headteacher if Waffle can visit class.
Bernie's Shell. Bernie needs a new shell. Oona and Silky find him the perfect replacement.
Hoops Van Badger. Stripes worries that the stage isn't loud enough when his hero comes to play a gig.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Getting On Badge. Animated preschool series. Fox, Badger, Mole, Vole and Worm are not getting on. Can Duggee and the Squirrels suggest ways that they can all live peacefully?
Hat. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'hat', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of hats.
Remix the Sixes. Meet the Six Times Table as she sings about all the Numberblocks who are part of her team.
Card. Educational fun. It's talent night and A and R are trying to do some magic, but their card trick keeps going wrong.
Summer. Justin has lots of outdoor summer fun with his friends. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble judges the Best Kept Garden competition - will the award go to Aunt Polly or Grandad Tumble?
Photos. Preschool series. The Teletubbies take selfies with the Tubby Phone and a child in Tummy Tales has their photo taken in a photo booth with their grandparent.
Patchwork Tiger. Patchwork Tiger has a problem: he wants to play Boo, but the Patchwork Pals don't want to. Will Tiger find someone to play with?
Raa Raa and the Speedy Racers. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa and his friends are racing their vehicles through the Jingly Jangly Jungle, but who will win?
The Three Ways of the Track. With guidance from the ever-wise Hanzo, an easily flustered Tai must learn how to remain focused, calm and balanced while on the job.
Episode 9. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Clumsy antiques expert Ann Teak examines a newspaper containing the world's first crossword puzzle.
Off-road Machines. Grace steers a four-wheel all-terrain vehicle, shows off a huge mining truck and then test drives a tracked all-terrain vehicle!
The Grow-Grow Lamp. The Game Catchers land on a planet that resembles a vegetable garden and learn to play bounced-ball. Before they begin, Pigi is accidentally transformed into a baby!
Pelicans. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. A floating garbage patch endangers a flock of pelicans and other sea creatures.
The Tale of the Cat and the Rat. Animated series. When Jemima and the ducklings are driven from their coop, Peter must enlist the unwitting help of Mr McGregor's cat.
The Wedding Badge. Animated preschool series. King Tiger has met his perfect partner and is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding, and Duggee is invited!
Juno's Got to Go. Juno has an accident when she doesn't go to the toilet before playing hide-and-seek.
The Big Supermarket Game Show. Supertato goes head-to-head with Evil Pea on Banana's Big Supermarket Game Show, but Evil Pea plans to cheat her way to winning a speedboat.
Mission Recipe. The Ducklings cook up some lovely vegetable dishes, but Weasy will only eat his popcorn.
Flap Away Home. When a lost bird takes a liking to Bo, it is up to Mojo to fly it home. But it's a stormy trip, and Bo will need to do some flying of his own!
Family Meeting. When Dad's accused of 'fluffing' in Bluey's face, Mum calls a meeting to settle the matter.
Bin Night. Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her. Mum offers some good advice.
Big Sister Nugget. Nugget plays big sister to a kid penguin for the summer. But when her hyper-energetic plans for fun activities prove unpopular, Pancake suggests an alternative approach.
Andy and the Grizzly Bear. Andy heads to North America to discover just how grizzly bears shed their winter coats.
Waffle's Great Escape. Mrs Hobbs is looking after Waffle, but he tries to escape to join Evie at school.
The Switch Places Wish. Rafi wishes she could be a grown-up for a while, and Aunty T wishes she could play in the park. A switching wish lets them swap places.
It's Time for a Roller Disco. JoJo is learning to roller skate, but there's not enough room. Time for a Gran Gran plan!
Birthday Buoy. Animation for preschool children. Sarah, Duck and Flamingo arrange a nautical surprise for John's birthday.
Snapper. Stop-motion animation. A robot lands on the planet. At first the Clangers are scared of it, but as they begin to accept it, they find it has a lot to show them.
Rainbows. MeMo and BaBa notice a rainbow in the sky after the rain stops, but where does it end? They embark on a journey to find more rainbows all over Planet BeddyByes.
Makka Pakka Gets Lost. Children's animation. Makka Pakka is in the garden looking for stones but gets lost and worries that he will not be able to find his way back.
Talia Mar - Nature's Toy Box. Talia Mar reads Nature's Toy Box, a story of how the smallest things in a garden can be more exciting than any TV show.
